caption: A man with blond hair and glasses, wearing a navy blue button-down shirt and white headphones, speaks into a professional microphone. He is seated in a room featuring a lit Christmas tree and a framed piece of art in the background. The sequence begins with a wide shot of him, but quickly transitions into a split-screen view where his video feed is reduced to a small inset window in the bottom left corner. The main focus of the screen shifts to a sequence of dynamic, abstract digital graphics. These graphics feature glowing green and blue lines, geometric shapes, and bright light effects. Legible on-screen text includes "SMALL PRESENT" in the upper left and "DISMISS ALL" and "BACK" at the bottom. The man remains visible in the inset window, continuing to speak as the large-scale visual effects evolve from dark, fragmented shapes into a bright, glowing yellow-green column of light.
